entertainment.titleText: Singapore Dating - Online Chat & Meet Singaporeans
entertainment.description: Singapore Dating is the best free dating app to connect with Singaporean singles! It is a great way to meet people, to make new friends and mingle with them. Or you want to find a lasting relationship and even for marriage? It’s all here!Love to meet new people, make friends, or find a date to hangout with tonight? It's easy! You can start by seeing video clips of singles and when you like someone, just click the heart. If they like you back, we will connect both of you

entertainment.titleText: Hong Kong Social - Dating app, Connect Hongkongers
entertainment.description:
Hong Kong Social is the best free dating app to connect with Hong Kong singles or to meet Hong Kong singles from around the world. Hong Kong Social is a great way to meet people around you in Hong Kong, make new friends and mingle with them, or to find lasting relationships and even for marriage! It’s all here. 
Whether you are looking to see Hong Kong girls or you’re looking for a friend during your stay in Hong Kong, Hong Kong Social will have someone for you

entertainment.titleText: Hobi - TV Series Tracker, Trakt Client For TV Shows
entertainment.description:
Hobi is a simple, lightweight TV tracker with lots of goodies for all series lovers.
Make the most out of your TV time with Hobi. Hobi will notify you when a new season premieres or when a new episode airs. Track your seen episodes with our special episode tracker. Use Hobi whenever you need a TV guide
